git-list.viewContainer.title: Git List
git-list.view.name: Git List
git-list.command.refreshRemotes: Fetch all remotes and refresh list
git-list.command.refreshRemoteBranches: Fetch this remote and refresh branches
git-list.command.clearAuthorColors: Git List: Clear Saved Author Icon Colors
git-list.command.deleteBranchesOlderThan: Delete local branches older than 6 months…
git-list.command.openCursorLineCommitFil: Git List: Open commit file diff (from cursor line hint)
git-list.config.title: Git List
git-list.config.commitsPageSize: Number of commits to show at first open and for each "Load more" click.
git-list.config.stashPageSize: Number of stashes to show at first open and for each "Load more" click.
git-list.config.branchesPageSize: Number of local branches to show when Branches is first expanded and for each "Load more" click.
git-list.config.remotesPageSize: Number of remote names to show when Remotes is first expanded and for each "Load more" click there. Branches under each remote use Branches page size.
git-list.config.showCursorLineGitHint: After the active line, show a name-rev–based ref label, blame author, and time. Hover for short/full hash, full commit message, and a link to preview this file’s diff in that commit.
git-list.config.cursorLineGitHintGapCh: Extra horizontal gap in **ch** units between the line text and the inline hint (after margin). 0–48.
git-list.config.cursorLineGitHintMinCode: If the line’s visual width in **ch** is less than this value, add extra space between the line end and the hint (does not shift source text). **0** disables. 0–256.
git-list.config.cursorLineGitHintColor: CSS color for the inline hint (e.g. `#888888`, `rgba(128,128,128,0.65)`). Leave empty for a lighter built-in theme color (`input.placeholderForeground`).
git-list.config.cursorLineGitHintPreload: Preload git blame for the first N lines of each file (one git blame call) so moving the caret within that range is faster. 0 disables preloading (only the current line is blamed on demand).
